regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Delegated act draft confirmed Class C; paper-MAP Class A (EUR 0.04/unit premium) vs mono-PE Class B pilot decision March 2026.

regulations.title: Verpackungsdurchführungsgesetz Amendment
regulations.summary: Consultation closes 31 March 2026; Bundesrat vote May 2026; PackML declaration due 30 June 2026.

regulations.title: Austrian EPR — ARA
regulations.summary: FY2025 declaration submitted 20 Feb: 78t total; EUR 16,840/year contribution; Q2 EUR 4,210 due 30 April 2026.

regulations.title: Lieferkettensorgfaltspflichtengesetz
regulations.summary: RSPO Mass Balance transition approved effective 1 April 2026; EUR 5,400/year premium; BAFA report in preparation.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive — AT
regulations.summary: AT CSDDD first reading approved; NZ butter import chain flagged; CSDDD clause to be added at September 2026 contract renewal.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: DMA expected completion March 2026; E1 oven audit underway; S2 RSPO transition addresses palm oil risk.
